organic_census_brands.description:
## 9. MeetGeek – Best for AI Notetaking

MeetGeek is an AI-powered transcription app that specializes in meeting transcriptions and summaries. The app’s advanced algorithms analyze your meeting content, identifying key topics, action items, and decisions made during the discussion. This feature provides you with concise and actionable insights, saving you time and effort in reviewing lengthy meeting recordings. [...] Standard Pay-As-You-Go Plan: $10 per hour for both transcription and translation
 Premium Subscription: $5 per hour, plus a $22 monthly fee per user. This also drops the translation cost to $3 per hour.
 Enterprise Subscription: Contact the Sonix sales team for custom pricing

Interested in experiencing Sonix’s 99% accuracy and fast turnaround times? Sign up for a 30-minute free trial today — no credit card required.

## 2. Otter.ai: Best for Meetings Notes

Otter.ai is another reliable transcription app, thanks to its real-time transcription capabilities. This feature makes it an excellent choice for meetings, lectures, and interviews, as you can see the transcript being generated as the conversation unfolds. [...] Seamless Integration with Video Conferencing Platforms: MeetGeek integrates effortlessly with popular video conferencing tools, such as Zoom, Microsoft Teams, and Google Meet. This integration allows you to transcribe and summarize your virtual meetings with ease, without the need for manual uploads or complex setup processes.
 Customizable Summary Templates: MeetGeek offers customizable summary templates that you can tailor to your specific needs. You can define the level of detail, highlight important points, and create a structure that aligns with your team’s communication style. This flexibility ensures that your meeting summaries are relevant, informative, and easy to follow.

organic_census_brands.title: AI Meeting Notes—Perfect meeting memory | Notion
organic_census_brands.description:
How do I start using AI Meeting Notes in Notion?

To start, type `/meet` on any Notion page, join a meeting from your Notion Calendar, or Notion will send a gentle reminder when it automatically detects meetings. AI Meeting Notes will begin capturing your meeting and generate an organized summary as soon as the meeting’s over.

Does AI Meeting Notes work with Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams?

Yes! AI Meeting Notes in Notion records system audio, so you can capture Zoom meetings, Google Meet calls, and Teams meeting—no bots or extra software required.

Can AI Meeting Notes create action items automatically?

Absolutely. Notion's AI analyzes your meeting transcript to generate summaries and action items, saving your team hours of manual work. [...] How fast are the summaries available after a meeting?

AI Meeting Notes generates summaries instantly after the meeting ends—no waiting. Your team can put action items to work right away.

Can I search across past meeting notes?

Yes! Every transcript, summary, decision, and action item is saved in Notion and fully searchable across your workspace using Notion AI.

Is my meeting data secure?

Yes. You control exactly who can see your meeting notes and transcripts. Plus, Notion provides built-in privacy settings and one-click consent collection before meetings start.

Why use Notion’s AI Meeting Notes instead of other meeting note apps? [...] Unlike standalone apps, AI Meeting Notes lives directly in your Notion workspace—meaning your notes, tasks, and projects stay seamlessly connected. No switching tools, no lost context.

What languages does AI Meeting Notes support?

AI Meeting Notes supports 16 languages including English, French, Japanese and more.

Can I use AI Meeting Notes for any type of meeting?

Yes, you can use AI Meeting Notes for any meeting! Whether it's a 1:1s, team sync, sales calls, AI will create a helpful summary based on the context to fit your needs.

What should I look out for when buying meeting notes products?

It’s a complicated market–check out our handy buyer’s guide for a breakdown on what to look out for.

organic_census_brands.title: Best AI Meeting Assistant Tools for 2026
organic_census_brands.description:
The top AI meeting note takers available are:

 tl;dv – Generates AI-powered summaries, real-time transcripts, and timestamped highlights.
 Fathom – Extracts key takeaways and action items automatically.
 Grain – Converts meeting discussions into editable, shareable video notes.
 Fireflies – Captures important insights and integrates with collaboration tools.
 Krisp – AI meeting notes with noise cancellation and accent conversion.
 Gemini – Uses Google AI to provide contextual meeting summaries. [...] Before we dive into the full list, it’s helpful to understand the difference: some tools are pure AI note takers—built solely to generate written summaries without recording or video playback. Others act as full meeting assistants, offering features like real-time transcription, video recording, follow-up automation, and integrations. Then there are hybrid tools like tl;dv, which combine both approaches to give you the full package: meeting intelligence and detailed, shareable notes.

While these five tools lead the way in AI-powered note-taking, many other options cater to different workflows, team sizes, and integration needs. Below is a comprehensive list of 20 AI meeting note takers, each offering unique features to help streamline meeting documentation and decision-making.

1. tl;dv [...] 11. Modjo

Modjo provides meeting notes with action item identification and tagging capabilities, tailored for sales-focused teams. It supports integration with CRM tools for workflow optimization.

12. Rewatch

Rewatch organizes meeting notes into searchable archives, allowing users to comment and collaborate on notes. It’s a good option for teams needing centralized meeting documentation. NOTE: This is being Sunsetted.

13. Supernormal

Supernormal offers concise AI-generated notes segmented by topics and action items. It supports adding comments and assigning tasks, making it versatile for various use cases.

14. Jiminny

organic_census_brands.title: Automated Transcription Software: Convert Audio to Text in ... - Sonix
organic_census_brands.description:
### What is automated transcription?

Automated transcription is the process of converting speech from audio or video files into written text using AI and machine learning. Unlike manual transcription by humans, automated transcription uses advanced speech recognition algorithms to process audio in minutes rather than hours, delivering accurate text at a fraction of the cost. Sonix's automated transcription works with any audio or video format and supports 53+ languages.

### How accurate is automated transcription? [...] Convert audio to text  
in minutes, not hours

Sonix uses advanced AI to transcribe your audio and video files with 99% accuracy. No complicated workflows, no human delays. Just fast, accurate, automated transcription you can depend on.

## Transcription that's fast, easy, and accurate

### Transcribe in minutes

Our AI processes audio 12x faster than real-time. A one-hour recording takes about 5 minutes to transcribe completely.

### No learning curve

Upload your file, click transcribe, and get your text. Our browser-based editor makes polishing transcripts simple.

### 99% word accuracy

Independently verified as the most accurate automated transcription. Custom dictionaries improve accuracy for specialized terms.

## Everything you need to know about automated transcription [...] ### Need help getting started?

Browse our Help Center , tutorials , and video guides .

Sonix converts your audio to text. It is 2026's best online transcription service.

Sonix is the world's most advanced automated transcription, translation, and subtitling platform. Fast, accurate, and affordable.

organic_census_brands.title: The Best Meeting Transcription Software in 2026
organic_census_brands.description:
### 1. tl;dv

tl;dv, which stands for “too long; didn’t view”, is one of the best meeting transcription apps on the market right now. Not only can you record, transcribe, and automatically summarize your virtual meetings, you can also make use of the countless other advanced features. But what makes tl;dv a fantastic tool is that you can get all the above features for free: unlimited video recordings, transcriptions, automated notes, summaries, and much more! [...] ## Best Meeting Transcription Services in 2026

Finding the perfect meeting transcription app in 2026 can revolutionize how teams work by streamlining communication and enhancing productivity. Tools like tl;dv, Otter, Notta, and Rev stand out as industry leaders, offering features such as real-time transcription, AI-powered summaries, and customizable templates. These apps cater to diverse needs. With solutions for recording meetings, generating insights, and integrating seamlessly into workflows, these transcription apps are essential for professionals aiming to stay ahead in today’s fast-paced, virtual-first world.

### 1. tl;dv [...] This powerful feature takes a weight off managers’ shoulders and automates analysis that would otherwise take all day. All the reports come with timestamps so you can swiftly jump between different moments from different calls. 70% of sales people believe that AI increases productivity at work. tl;dv is a prime example as to why.

Multi-meeting report

tl;dv’s sales coaching features also push it to be one of the best meeting transcription apps in 2026. You can’t just simply transcribe meetings to be at the top any longer. You need to be able to use the insights gathered to increase productivity and enhance your strategy – particularly your sales strategy.

organic_census_brands.title: AI Meeting Notes—Perfect meeting memory | Notion
organic_census_brands.description:
How do I start using AI Meeting Notes in Notion?

To start, type `/meet` on any Notion page, join a meeting from your Notion Calendar, or Notion will send a gentle reminder when it automatically detects meetings. AI Meeting Notes will begin capturing your meeting and generate an organized summary as soon as the meeting’s over.

Does AI Meeting Notes work with Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams?

Yes! AI Meeting Notes in Notion records system audio, so you can capture Zoom meetings, Google Meet calls, and Teams meeting—no bots or extra software required.

Can AI Meeting Notes create action items automatically?

Absolutely. Notion's AI analyzes your meeting transcript to generate summaries and action items, saving your team hours of manual work. [...] # AI Meeting NotesPerfect meeting memory.

Your notetaker catches every detail and delivers actionable summaries, right where you work.

Try for free

Trusted by those at

## Tailored to every meeting.

1:1s

Capture conversations anywhere. Sync your calendar, and note-taking happens automatically.

Works with any video tool

It transcribes your system’s audio and mic. No setup, no bots.

Even for face-to-face

Capture notes in person on any device.

Syncs with your calendar

Notes get created, started, and shared with attendees for you. [...] Unlike standalone apps, AI Meeting Notes lives directly in your Notion workspace—meaning your notes, tasks, and projects stay seamlessly connected. No switching tools, no lost context.

What languages does AI Meeting Notes support?

AI Meeting Notes supports 16 languages including English, French, Japanese and more.

Can I use AI Meeting Notes for any type of meeting?

Yes, you can use AI Meeting Notes for any meeting! Whether it's a 1:1s, team sync, sales calls, AI will create a helpful summary based on the context to fit your needs.

What should I look out for when buying meeting notes products?

It’s a complicated market–check out our handy buyer’s guide for a breakdown on what to look out for.

organic_census_brands.title: 12 Best Meeting Transcription Software Options - Sonix
organic_census_brands.description:
If you are looking for a transcription software that combines low prices with high levels of accuracy and extensive integrations, Sonix should be your top choice for meeting transcription software.

Experience Sonix’s remarkable 99% accuracy and rapid turnaround times with a 30-minute free trial. No credit card required. Sign up today and see the difference for yourself.

## 2. Otter.ai

Otter.ai is a popular choice for meeting transcription, offering a range of features that make it easy to capture and share meeting notes. Otter is primarily a tool for real-time transcription. With its integration for most of the popular web conferencing apps, Otter can join your meetings and transcribe content automatically. [...] ## 1. Sonix

Sonix is the premier AI transcription tool available, known for its unbeatable combination of affordability, speed, and high accuracy. Whether you’re transcribing meetings, interviews, or podcasts, Sonix delivers fast, reliable results that won’t break the bank. It’s perfect for professionals who need quick, precise transcriptions without compromising quality.

With Sonix, you get top-tier transcription services at a fraction of the cost of traditional methods.

### Features of Sonix

When it comes to meeting transcription software, Sonix stands out with its impressive array of features designed to deliver high accuracy, fast turnaround, and robust security. Here’s a detailed look at what makes Sonix the go-to tool for meeting transcription needs. [...] Real-time Transcription and Summarization: Fireflies transcribes meetings live and generates AI-powered summaries. The tool auto-joins virtual meetings, captures conversations, and provides easy-to-read transcripts with action items, allowing users to focus on discussions without missing key details.
 Collaboration and Workflow Automation: Fireflies facilitates collaboration by enabling users to comment, pin, and create soundbites from transcriptions. It integrates with CRM tools and productivity platforms like Slack, Asana, and Trello to automate task creation and workflow management directly from meeting discussions.

## AI Notetaker journey from words to valuable knowledge

The only AI powered platform that takes notes, transcribes meetings, and turns meeting insights into actionable visuals.

#### Take notes anywhere — in-person and online

Virtual or offline meetings and uploaded files, every discussion flows into one workspace, ready for instant transcription and analysis.

#### In-person meetings

Imported files

#### 58 languages [...] What's the learning curve?

Zero setup required. Record → Ask → Get insights. Most users create their first infographic within 2 minutes. No training needed.

Does it integrate with my tools?

Yes. Export to Google Drive, Notion, Slack, Salesforce, and more. Plus native integrations with Zoom, Teams, and Google Meet.

What languages do you support?

58 languages for transcription. Notta currently generates content in English, Japanese, Chinese, Spanish, and German and more.

How much does it cost?

Free plan includes 200 transcription minutes/month. Pro plans start at $8.17/month (billed annually).

organic_census_brands.title: AI Meeting Notes—Perfect meeting memory | Notion
organic_census_brands.description:
How fast are the summaries available after a meeting?

AI Meeting Notes generates summaries instantly after the meeting ends—no waiting. Your team can put action items to work right away.

Can I search across past meeting notes?

Yes! Every transcript, summary, decision, and action item is saved in Notion and fully searchable across your workspace using Notion AI.

Is my meeting data secure?

Yes. You control exactly who can see your meeting notes and transcripts. Plus, Notion provides built-in privacy settings and one-click consent collection before meetings start.

Why use Notion’s AI Meeting Notes instead of other meeting note apps? [...] # AI Meeting NotesPerfect meeting memory.

Your notetaker catches every detail and delivers actionable summaries, right where you work.

Try for free

Uh-oh! It looks like your ad blocker is preventing the video from playing.

Trusted by those at

## Tailored to every meeting.

Every summary gives you exactly what you need to move work forward.

1:1s

Team syncs

Client calls

Interviews

Brainstorms

## Works everywhere you do.

Capture conversations anywhere. Sync your calendar, and note-taking happens automatically.

Works with any video tool

It transcribes your system’s audio and mic. No setup, no bots.

Even for face-to-face

Capture notes in person on any device.

Syncs with your calendar

Notes get created, started, and shared with attendees for you. [...] How do I start using AI Meeting Notes in Notion?

To start, type `/meet` on any Notion page, join a meeting from your Notion Calendar, or Notion will send a gentle reminder when it automatically detects meetings. AI Meeting Notes will begin capturing your meeting and generate an organized summary as soon as the meeting’s over.

Does AI Meeting Notes work with Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams?

Yes! AI Meeting Notes in Notion records system audio, so you can capture Zoom meetings, Google Meet calls, and Teams meeting—no bots or extra software required.

Can AI Meeting Notes create action items automatically?

Absolutely. Notion's AI analyzes your meeting transcript to generate summaries and action items, saving your team hours of manual work.
